Start Here
Welcome to Empire
Read this before you touch anything else. This is the foundation.
The Mission

Empire Financial Group was built with one goal: give every agent on this team the tools, training, and system to hit $10,000 a month and beyond. The Road to a Million is not a slogan — it is a blueprint. Follow the system, hit the standard, and the income follows.

Morning Routine — Non-Negotiable

Every day before you dial: personal development, get your mind right, review your numbers from yesterday, and be at your desk by 8AM. The agents who win are the ones who show up consistently, not occasionally.

Daily Activity Standard

400 dials. 8 appointments. 3 presentations. 1 sale. This is not a goal — it is the floor. The minimum acceptable day. Hit this every single day and your income takes care of itself. The math works when you work the math.

Product Stack

Primary products: Mortgage Protection (MP) and Final Expense (FE). Advanced products: IUL, term life, and annuities. Start with MP and FE — they close fastest and pay the most consistently for new agents.

Target Market

Primary: Mortgage protection — homeowners 30-65 who just bought or refinanced and need to protect their home for their family. Secondary: Final expense — pre-retirees 55-75 looking to cover burial costs and protect their loved ones.

The Non-Negotiables

1. Never miss a scheduled appointment.
2. Always be licensed in the state you are selling in.
3. Never misrepresent a product.
4. Log your numbers every single day in the tracker.
5. Protect the Empire brand — you represent all of us.
